title: Demystifying A2UI: How to Make AI Agents “Speak UI” in Your App
description: Explore A2UI, a cutting-edge approach that empowers AI agents to understand and interact with user interfaces programmatically. This guide delves into the principles of making AI agents 'speak UI', enabling them to navigate, interpret, and manipulate application interfaces just like a human user. Learn how to integrate this technology into your apps to create smarter, more autonomous AI experiences and automate complex UI workflows.
author: Satish
